title: Domain Records, Pure Pipeline Stages, and Serialization · Transfer Build
summary: An independent archive team receives a different authorized corpus, platform, language mix, file size, report consumer, terminal width, error policy, and delivery constraint and transfers domain records, pure pipeline stages, and serialization into a changed typed cumulative analysis pipeline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of typed cumulative analysis pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-…
objectives: Model input identity, policy, token, statistics, ranking row, and report metadata with explicit dataclasses or typed records.
Use immutable records where post-computation mutation would invalidate retained evidence.
Give each pipeline stage typed input, output, invariant, failure, and version contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Domain Records
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Bookbot team handles case 9448 during a multilingual community archive intake. Build deterministic Python evidence to compose typed stages and immutable evidence under a versioned serialization schema; retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity; then split one word and one UTF-8 sequence across stream chunks and compare batch output byte-for-byte. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model input identity, policy, token, statistics, ranking row, and report metadata with explicit dataclasses or typed records.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Domain Records.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model input identity, policy, token, statistics, ranking row, and report metadata with explicit dataclasses or typed records. For Bookbot and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Domain Records, keep Domain Records connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: bookbot-serialization-schema-37xy2n
# Competency: bookbot-serialization-schema.
# Case 8884: a multilingual community archive intake.
# Operating constraint: keep stdout machine-safe, diagnostics on stderr, status explicit, and every signal understandable without color.
# Changed case: introduce an equal-frequency tie and prove the secondary ranking key is stable.
def evidence_bookbot_serialization_schema_37xy2n(stages: int = 7, immutable_records: bool = True, typed_boundaries: bool = True, schema_version: int = 1, stage_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_37xy2n = "37xy2n-n2yx73-8884"
    assert evidence_variant_37xy2n
    evidence_axes_37xy2n = (
        "corpus37xy2n",
        "policyn2yx73",
        "revision8884",
        "command37xy2n8884",
        "reportn2yx738884",
        "test888437xy2n",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_37xy2n)) == 6
    if stages < 5 or schema_version < 1:
        return False, stages, "pipeline-shape"
    if not immutable_records:
        return False, stages, "mutable-evidence"
    if not typed_boundaries:
        return False, stages, "untyped-stage"
    if stage_failures > 0:
        return False, stage_failures, "stage-failure"
    assert stages >= 5
    return True, schema_version, "versioned-pipeline"
